narrative:
Glenwillow City has 579 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 29.7 percentage points.
